title: anthyllis vulnerarioides var. bonjeanii
intro: Anthyllis vulnerarioides var. bonjeanii, also known as kidney vetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and promote wound healing. The health benefits associated with kidney vetch include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support urinary tract health. Kidney vetch can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
